data.description: Step 1 extracted find_ready_tickets verbatim, so ticket_graph/_ready.py re-declares its own _BLOCKING_RELATIONS and hand-rolls blocked_by, duplicating ticket_graph._status._BLOCKING_RELATIONS and the traversal in _blockers.py/_graph.py. Converge _ready.py onto _status._BLOCKING_RELATIONS (at minimum) so the new SSOT isn't forked inside its own package. Behavior-neutral; guard with parity tests. Surfaced by Opus review of 4283f71.
data.title: #2 Step 4b: converge _ready.py blocker vocabulary onto ticket_graph._status
